integrations.title: Seamless Integrations
integrations.body: MyAllocator connects to over 100 booking channels, payment gateways, and smart-home devices — so you can run your business from a single dashboard.

items.question: What is MyAllocator?
items.answer: MyAllocator is an all-in-one vacation-rental management platform that includes a channel manager, booking engine, dynamic pricing, guest communications, website builder, and more.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: Yes! You can start a free trial with no credit card required. Explore every feature and see the results for yourself before committing.

items.question: Which channels does MyAllocator support?
items.answer: We support over 100 channels including Airbnb, Booking.com, Vrbo, Expedia, Google Vacation Rentals, and many more niche OTAs.

items.question: How does dynamic pricing work?
items.answer: Our algorithm analyses market demand, local events, competitor rates, and seasonality to automatically adjust your rates in real time — maximizing revenue while keeping occupancy high.

items.question: Can I manage multiple properties?
items.answer: Absolutely. MyAllocator is designed to scale from a single listing to hundreds of properties, with bulk editing, team roles, and portfolio-level reporting.

items.question: What is included in the plan?
items.answer: Everything: channel manager, booking engine, dynamic pricing, guest communications, website builder, reporting, and unlimited team members.

items.question: Are there any hidden fees?
items.answer: No. The price you see is the price you pay. There are no setup fees, no per-booking commissions, and no surprise charges.

items.question: Can I cancel at any time?
items.answer: Yes. There are no long-term contracts. You can cancel your subscription at any time directly from your account settings.

items.question: Do you offer a discount for annual billing?
items.answer: Yes — paying annually saves you up to 20 % compared with monthly billing.

cta.heading: Ready to Grow Your Rental Business?
cta.secondary: Start your free trial today — no credit card required.
